rows.description: Solula Dn. Rectori Scholaribus et Officiarius
rows.notes: Description combined from both extractors for accuracy. 'Solula' from gemini-flash and 'Dn.' from gpt-5-mini are visually more precise. 'Officiarius' for the ending. Both correctly identified as a header with no amounts.
rows.section_header: Solula Dn. Rectori Scholaribus et Officiarius

rows.notes: Description 'ad Gestuna Natio:' from gemini-flash is visually more accurate ('Gestuna' vs 'Testum' in gpt-5-mini). gpt-5-mini's note correctly highlights that the text is somewhat compressed and faint, contributing to ambiguity. Both correctly identified as a header.

Visual verification confirms this is an entry with an associated amount (19 13 4). gpt-5-mini correctly extracted the row type, description, and amounts. gemini-flash incorrectly identified it as a header with no amount, representing a critical error.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipend payment to college beneficiaries amounting to £19 13s 4d.

rows.description: Pro augment South N. et Merton
rows.notes: The description 'Pro augment South N. et Merton' from gemini-flash is visually more accurate ('N.' vs 'M.' in gpt-5-mini). The amount (26 0 0) from gpt-5-mini is visually correct. gemini-flash had a critical error, extracting the amount from the previous row instead of the correct value.
rows.english_description: Payment towards augmentation for South Newington and Merton.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment towards augmentation for South Newington and Merton amounting to £26 0s 0d.

rows.notes: The description 'Stipend: Due Shiers' from gemini-flash is visually more accurate ('Due' vs 'Dna' in gpt-5-mini). The amount (33 6 8) from gpt-5-mini is visually correct. gemini-flash again incorrectly copied the amount from the preceding row.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipend due to Shiers amounting to £33 6s 8d.

rows.notes: The description 'Div: Due Shiers' from gemini-flash is visually more accurate ('Due' vs 'Dna' in gpt-5-mini). The amount (50 0 0) from gpt-5-mini is visually correct. gemini-flash continued its pattern of incorrectly copying the amount from the preceding row.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Dividend payment due to Shiers amounting to £50 0s 0d.

rows.notes: gpt-5-mini correctly identified this as a header row with no associated amounts. Visually, 'Gestum' is more accurate than 'Testum' from gpt-5-mini. gemini-flash completely misinterpreted this row, listing the previous line's amount ('50') as both description and amount, and misclassifying it as an entry.

gpt-5-mini correctly identified this as an entry row with description 'Stipend' and amount 33 6 8. gemini-flash was severely misaligned at this point, attempting to extract the previous (header) row's description ('ad Gestum Annue:') as a header itself.
rows.english_description: Annual stipend payment to college beneficiaries.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual stipend payment to college beneficiaries amounting to £33 6s 8d.

rows.notes: gpt-5-mini correctly extracted the base amounts (22 3 8). Visual verification clarifies the description should be 'Ridling:' (not 'Kidling:' from gpt-5-mini) and the fraction is a clear '1/4' (0.25), not '0.5' as gpt-5-mini noted. gemini-flash was misaligned and extracted incorrect data for this row.
rows.english_description: Payment representing the third part relating to Ridling/Riding (Anglia).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment representing the third part relating to Ridling/Riding (Anglia), amounting to £22 3s 8.25d.

rows.notes: gpt-5-mini correctly identified this as a header with no amounts. Visual verification clarifies the description to 'ad Sost: D.g. Bapt:' (not 'ad Test: Dn. Bapt:' from gpt-5-mini). gemini-flash was misaligned and incorrect for this row.

gpt-5-mini correctly identified the amount (58 6 8). The description is visually two lines, 'Stip' and 'Pro 4ta parte Ridingt: ang:', combined into a single entry description. gemini-flash was severely misaligned and incorrect, splitting this description into two separate, misclassified rows (R13 and R14 in its output).

rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipend for the fourth part of the Riding (Anglia) amounting to £58 6s 8d.
